name: Twisted love
description:
“Sometimes the hardest part isn’t lying to the world... it’s lying to yourself.”

Madison Clarke has it all — head cheerleader, queen of pep rallies, and the perfect girlfriend to Dane Whitaker, the school’s star center back. Together, they’re the couple everyone envies: golden, untouchable, destined for the yearbook cover.

But behind the practiced smiles and flawless reputation, Maddie carries a secret she can’t confess — her heart doesn’t belong to Dane. It belongs to someone else. Someone who makes her feel real, seen, alive in ways the spotlight never could.

Caught between the image everyone expects and the love she can’t deny, Maddie walks a dangerous line. How long can she keep playing her role before the truth unravels — and the golden couple shatters?
creator: D@n
